test_desc: Smoke - Tenant ADMIN login succeeds
test_step: Navigate to /auth/login; Enter ADMIN username and password for the test tenant; Click Login; Wait for redirect
expected_result: Redirected to /console/dashboard; Dashboard KPI cards visible (Revenue Today, Revenue MTD, Inventory Value, Pending Approvals, Active Transfers, Low-Stock Alerts); Sidebar shows all authorized retail module links; No system-admin-only sections visible

test_desc: Smoke - Location list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Wait for page load
expected_result: Location list page loads; Table shows location columns (name, code, type, status); Add Location button visible

test_desc: Smoke - Tax config page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Wait for page load
expected_result: Tax configuration page loads; Shows existing tax config (if any) or empty state; Add/Edit Tax Config button visible

test_desc: Smoke - Product list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Wait for page load
expected_result: Product list page loads; Table shows product columns (name, SKU, category, price, status); Add Product button visible; Category filter dropdown visible

test_desc: Smoke - Supplier list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Wait for page load
expected_result: Supplier list page loads; Table shows supplier columns (code, name, payment terms, status); Add Supplier button visible

test_desc: Smoke - PO list page loads with status tabs
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Wait for page load
expected_result: PO list page loads; Status filter tabs or dropdown visible (Draft, Pending Approval, Approved, Sent, Partially Received, Fully Received, Closed, Cancelled, All); Create PO button visible; Table shows PO columns

test_desc: Smoke - GRN list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/grn/grn; Wait for page load
expected_result: GRN list page loads; Table shows GRN number, PO reference, supplier, location, status, date; Create GRN button visible

test_desc: Smoke - Supplier return list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-return/return; Wait for page load
expected_result: Return list loads; Shows return number, GRN reference, supplier, status, date; Create Return button visible; Credit Note menu item accessible

test_desc: Smoke - Transfer list page loads
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/transfer/transfer; Wait for page load
expected_result: Transfer list loads; Table shows transfer number, from location, to location, status, date; Create Transfer button visible; Status filter visible

test_desc: Smoke - All inventory sub-pages load
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/inventory-management/stock-count; Then /adjustment; Then /movement; Then /alerts; Then /consolidated; Then /valuation
expected_result: Each page loads without errors; Stock Count shows list with New Count button; Adjustment shows list with New Adjustment button; Movement shows ledger table; Alerts shows alert rules and active alerts banner; Consolidated shows cross-location inventory table; Valuation shows summary cards and location breakdown

test_desc: Smoke - All report pages load
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/report/dashboard; Then /revenue; Then /inventory; Then /pos; Then /tax; Then /procurement; Then /transfer; Then /schedules
expected_result: Each report page loads without errors; Dashboard shows KPI cards and charts; All data report pages show their respective tables and charts; Schedules page shows list with Add Schedule button

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create shop location
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click Add Location; Fill Name with 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Fill Code with 'TPM'; Set Type to 'shop'; Fill Address with 'Jl. Menteng Raya No. 1, Jakarta Pusat'; Fill Phone with '021-1234567'; Set Status to 'active'; Click Save
expected_result: Location created successfully; 'Toko Pusat Menteng' appears in location list with code 'TPM', type 'shop', status 'active'; Location detail shows all entered information

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create warehouse location
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click Add Location; Fill Name with 'Gudang Cakung'; Fill Code with 'GDG'; Set Type to 'warehouse'; Set Status to 'active'; Click Save
expected_result: Warehouse location created; Appears in list with code 'GDG' and type 'warehouse'; Both locations now available in dropdowns across all modules (PO, Transfer, GRN)

test_desc: Full CRUD - Set up PPN 11% inclusive
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/tax-configuration/config; Click Add Tax Config; Fill Tax Name with 'PPN 11%'; Fill Rate with '11'; Set Calculation Mode to 'inclusive'; Set Status to 'active'; Click Save
expected_result: Tax config saved; Rate shows 11%; Mode shows 'inclusive'; Status 'active'; This config is now used in POS calculations

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create product category hierarchy
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/category; Click Add Category; Fill Name with 'Minuman'; Set Status to active; Click Save; Click Add Category again; Fill Name with 'Kopi'; Select Parent Category 'Minuman'; Set Status to active; Click Save
expected_result: 'Minuman' category created at level 1; 'Kopi' category created at level 2 with parent 'Minuman'; Both appear in category list with correct hierarchy

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create simple product with barcode
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click Add Product; Fill SKU Code with 'KPI-001'; Fill Product Name with 'Kopi Hitam'; Select Category 'Kopi'; Set UOM to 'cup'; Fill Base Cost Price with '5000'; Fill Selling Price with '15000'; Check Tax Applicable; Set Status to 'active'; In Barcodes section click Add Barcode; Type barcode value '8991234567890'; Set type 'EAN-13'; Click Save
expected_result: Product created successfully; SKU 'KPI-001' shows in product list; Barcode '8991234567890' linked to product; Product appears in POS product grid when navigating to /pos; Tax calculated at 11% on this product

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create product with variants
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click Add Product; Fill SKU with 'KPI-002'; Fill Name with 'Kopi Susu'; Select Category 'Kopi'; Fill Cost Price with '8000'; Fill Selling Price with '25000'; Check Tax Applicable; Set Status to active; In Variants section click Add Variant; Fill Variant SKU 'KPI-002-S'; Set attributes Size=Small; Fill Cost Price '8000'; Fill Selling Price '22000'; Add another variant: SKU 'KPI-002-L'; attributes Size=Large; Cost '10000'; Selling '28000'; Click Save
expected_result: Product 'Kopi Susu' created with 2 variants (Small and Large); Each variant has its own SKU and pricing; Variants appear in POS as separate selectable items or as a variant-selection dialog

test_desc: Full CRUD - Edit product status to active
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Find product with status 'draft'; Click Edit; Change Status from 'draft' to 'active'; Click Save
expected_result: Product status updated to active; Appears in POS product grid immediately (or after cache refresh); Product list shows updated status badge

test_desc: Full CRUD - Import products from CSV template
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/import-export/template; Download CSV template; Open template; Fill in 3 rows of product data with valid SKUs (CSV-P-001, CSV-P-002, CSV-P-003), names, categories, prices; Upload the filled CSV at /console/modules/product-catalog/import-export/import; Submit; Wait for results
expected_result: Template downloads with correct headers; Import completes with 3 products imported; Result shows: imported=3, skipped=0, errors=0; All 3 products appear in product list

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create supplier with contact persons
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-management/supplier; Click Add Supplier; Fill Code with 'SUP-001'; Fill Company Name with 'PT Kopi Nusantara'; Fill NPWP with '01.234.567.8-901.000'; Set Payment Terms to 'NET30'; Fill Credit Limit with '50000000'; Set Status to active; In Contacts section click Add Contact; Fill name 'Andi Wijaya'; Set role 'Sales'; Fill phone '08123456789'; Fill email 'andi@kopinusantara.id'; Click Save
expected_result: Supplier created successfully; 'PT Kopi Nusantara' appears in supplier list with code 'SUP-001', status 'active'; Supplier detail shows contact person 'Andi Wijaya' in Sales role; Supplier available in PO creation dropdown

test_desc: Full CRUD - Configure PO approval rule
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/config; Click Add Rule; Set Transaction Type to 'purchase_order'; Toggle Approval Required ON; Fill Threshold with '1000000'; Set Approver Role to 'ADMIN'; Click Save
expected_result: Approval rule saved; Rule appears in configuration list showing: type=purchase_order, approval_required=true, threshold=1000000, approver=ADMIN; Rule is now active for new POs

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create PO below approval threshold (auto-approved)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Click Create PO; Select Supplier 'PT Kopi Nusantara'; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Set Expected Delivery Date to next week; Click Add Item; Select product 'Kopi Hitam'; Set Quantity to 10; Set Unit Price to 5000; Verify line total shows 50000; Click Submit
expected_result: PO created; Since total (50000) is below threshold (1000000), PO status immediately becomes 'approved' (no approval needed); PO number auto-generated in format PO-YYYYMM-NNNN; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create PO above threshold (requires approval)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Click Create PO; Select Supplier 'PT Kopi Nusantara'; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Set Expected Delivery Date; Add Item: Kopi Hitam, Quantity 500, Unit Price 5000; Verify grand total exceeds 1000000; Click Submit
expected_result: System returns HTTP 202 with message 'Approval required. Your request has been submitted for review.'; PO status shows 'pending_approval'; PO appears in Approval Engine pending list; Edit actions are disabled on the PO while pending

test_desc: Full CRUD - Approve pending PO
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/pending; Find the PO in pending list; Review the total amount and requestor; Click Approve; Optionally add comment 'Approved - within budget'; Click Confirm
expected_result: PO status changes from 'pending_approval' to 'approved'; Approval record created in approval history with approver name, timestamp, and comment; PO disappears from pending list; 'Mark as Sent' action now available on PO

test_desc: Full CRUD - Reject PO and revise
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/pending; Find a pending PO; Click Reject; Enter rejection reason 'Quantity too high for current budget - please reduce to 200 units'; Click Confirm Rejection; Navigate to PO list; Find the rejected PO
expected_result: PO status changes from 'pending_approval' back to 'draft'; Rejection reason stored and visible on PO detail; PO can now be edited to reduce quantity and resubmitted

test_desc: Full CRUD - Send approved PO to supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Find an approved PO; Click 'Mark as Sent'; Confirm action
expected_result: PO status changes from 'approved' to 'sent'; Sent timestamp recorded; PDF download option available; PO is now in GRN-creatable status

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create GRN for full receipt
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/grn/grn; Click Create GRN; Select the sent PO from dropdown; Verify all ordered items are pre-filled with received quantity matching ordered quantity; Click Move to Quality Inspection; Mark all items as Passed; Click Accept; Click Update Stock
expected_result: GRN created in 'draft' status; After quality inspection: status moves to 'quality_inspection'; After Accept: status moves to 'accepted'; After Update Stock: status moves to 'stock_updated'; PO status changes to 'fully_received'; Inventory for each received product is incremented by received quantity; Inventory movement records created with type 'grn'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create GRN with partial receipt and rejections
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/grn/grn; Click Create GRN; Select a sent PO; For item 'Kopi Hitam' ordered 500 units: Set Received Quantity to 450; Set Rejected Quantity to 20; Select Rejection Reason 'defective'; Click Move to Quality Inspection; Mark accepted items as Passed; Accept; Update Stock
expected_result: GRN accepted quantity = 450 - 20 = 430 units; PO item received_quantity updated to 430; PO status changes to 'partially_received' (not fully received); Inventory incremented by 430 units; GRN status shows 'stock_updated'; Rejection reason recorded

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create supplier return and process to closed
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-return/return; Click Create Return; Select GRN in accepted or stock_updated status; Select item 'Kopi Hitam'; Set Return Quantity to 20; Select Reason 'defective'; Click Save; Submit for approval (or skip if no approval rule); Click Approve; Click Mark as Dispatched; Click Mark as Acknowledged; Click Record Credit Note; Fill Credit Note Number 'CN-2026-001'; Fill Amount 100000; Fill Date today; Toggle Is Replacement to No; Click Save; Click Close Return
expected_result: Return number auto-generated in format SR-YYYYMM-NNNN; Each status transition recorded with timestamp; After recording credit note: status moves to 'credit_note_received' automatically; After Close: status is 'closed'; Full 7-stage timeline visible on return detail

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create and finalize stock count
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/inventory-management/stock-count; Click New Count; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Wait for count session to open with all active products; For 'Kopi Hitam' enter Counted Quantity as system quantity minus 5 (to simulate shortage); For another product enter Counted Quantity as system quantity plus 3 (overage); Click Save progress; Click Finalize Count; Confirm finalization
expected_result: Count session created with all active products; System quantities pre-populated; After save: progress preserved; After finalize: for items with variance ≠ 0, adjustment records created; Inventory updated to match counted quantities; Movement records created with type 'stock_count'; Shortage item shows negative variance in red; Overage item shows positive variance in green

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create manual stock adjustment
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/inventory-management/adjustment; Click New Adjustment; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Select Product 'Kopi Hitam'; Enter Quantity '-5' (negative = deduct); Select Reason 'damage'; Fill Notes with 'Broken cups during storage'; Click Save
expected_result: Adjustment created; Inventory for 'Kopi Hitam' at 'Toko Pusat Menteng' reduced by 5 units; Movement record created with type 'adjustment', qty=-5; Adjustment appears in adjustment list with all details; Movement ledger shows the deduction

test_desc: Full CRUD - Configure and view low-stock alert
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/inventory-management/alerts; Click Add Alert Rule; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Select Product 'Kopi Hitam'; Set Min Quantity to 50; Set Max Quantity to 500; Click Save; Navigate back to Alerts page
expected_result: Alert rule created for Kopi Hitam at TPM location; Rule shows in configuration table; If current qty_on_hand ≤ 50: product appears in Active Alerts banner at top of page in red; Alert rule can be edited or deactivated

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create and complete inter-shop transfer
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/transfer/transfer; Click New Transfer; Set From Location 'Gudang Cakung'; Set To Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Click Add Item; Select Product 'Kopi Hitam'; Enter Quantity 100; Click Submit; If approval needed: approve it; Click Start Picking; Enter Picked Quantity 100 for each item; Click Dispatch; Log in as receiving location user; Find the dispatched transfer; Click Receive; Enter Received Quantity 100; Click Confirm Receipt; Click Close
expected_result: Transfer number generated in format TRF-YYYYMM-NNNN; Each status transition recorded; On Dispatch: source inventory (Gudang) decremented by 100, dest in_transit incremented by 100; On Receive: dest in_transit decremented, dest qty_on_hand (TPM) incremented by 100; On Close: transfer finalized; Movement records created for transfer_out and transfer_in

test_desc: Full CRUD - Transfer with receiving discrepancy
test_step: Create a transfer of 50 units; Complete through to Dispatched status; On receiving: click Receive; Enter Received Quantity of 45 (5 less than dispatched); Confirm receipt; View transfer detail
expected_result: Discrepancy flag set: receivedQty=45, expectedQty=50, discrepancy=-5; Discrepancy reason auto-set to 'short'; Transfer detail shows discrepancy column with -5 highlighted; Transfer moves to 'received' status; Inventory updated with actually received quantity (45)

test_desc: Full CRUD - View dashboard and navigate to drill-downs
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/report/dashboard; Note all 6 KPI card values; Click revenue chart bar; View inventory by location pie chart; Click 'New PO' quick action button
expected_result: Dashboard loads with real data in all 6 KPI cards; Revenue trend chart shows last 30 days of data; Pie chart shows distribution across locations; Clicking 'New PO' navigates to PO creation form

test_desc: Full CRUD - Export revenue report as XLSX
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/report/revenue; Select period 'Last 30 days'; Wait for data to load; Click Export dropdown; Select XLSX
expected_result: Revenue report loads with trend chart, revenue by shop table, and top products table; XLSX file downloads immediately; File contains formatted workbook with report data; File is openable in Excel or Google Sheets

test_desc: Full CRUD - Export tax report as PDF
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/report/tax; Select period 'Last 30 days'; Wait for data to load; Click Export; Select PDF
expected_result: Tax report loads with Total PPN collected card, PPN by location table, PPN by category table; PDF file downloads; PDF contains header with report name and date range, all tables, and footer; Suitable for tax filing reference

test_desc: Full CRUD - Set up and trigger scheduled report
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/report/schedules; Click Add Schedule; Set Report Type to 'Revenue'; Set Frequency to 'daily'; Set Time to '08:00'; Set Format to 'XLSX'; Add Recipient email 'owner@tmj.co.id'; Click Save; Find the new schedule; Click Run Now; Wait for confirmation
expected_result: Schedule created and appears in schedules list; Run Now triggers immediate report generation; Success notification confirms email was queued; Report email sent to owner@tmj.co.id with XLSX attachment (verify via email or check queue)

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create staff user and assign MANAGER role
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click Add User; Fill Fullname 'Siti Rahayu'; Fill Username 'siti.rahayu'; Fill Email 'siti@tmj.co.id'; Fill Password 'Manager123!'; Set Status active; Click Save; Navigate to /console/system/role; Find 'MANAGER' role; Click to view; Find Add User or assign user option; Add 'siti.rahayu' to MANAGER role
expected_result: User 'siti.rahayu' created; User assigned to MANAGER role; When siti logs in: she sees reports, inventory, transfers, PO list but NOT admin-only screens like tenant management or module authorization

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create cashier user with PIN
test_step: Navigate to /console/system/user; Click Add User; Fill Fullname 'Dedi Kurniawan'; Fill Username 'dedi.kurniawan'; Fill Password 'Cashier123!'; Set Status active; Save; On user detail page click Set PIN; Enter PIN '1234'; Confirm PIN '1234'; Save; Navigate to /console/system/role; Assign 'dedi.kurniawan' to CASHIER role
expected_result: User created; PIN set successfully; When Dedi navigates to /auth/pin-login and enters username 'dedi.kurniawan' and PIN '1234', he is authenticated; Dedi can access POS but not management console modules

test_desc: Full CRUD - Import MokaPOS CSV and verify data
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/moka-migration/import; Select Location 'Toko Pusat Menteng'; Upload a test MokaPOS CSV with 10 Regular products, 2 Variant products (3 variants each), and 2 Modifier rows; Click Parse CSV; Review preview screen; Click Import; Wait for completion
expected_result: Parse step: shows 10 regular products, 2 variant parents (6 variants total), 2 modifiers skipped, no critical warnings; Import step: products created, categories created, variants created, opening stock set; Completion summary shows correct counts; Products visible in product catalog; Opening balance movements visible in inventory movement ledger

test_desc: Full CRUD - Rollback MokaPOS import batch
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/moka-migration/history; Find the just-completed import batch; Note the counts (products, variants, barcodes, stock entries); Click Rollback (trash icon); Read warning dialog; Confirm rollback
expected_result: Rollback dialog warns that all entities will be permanently deleted; After confirm: batch status changes to 'rolled_back'; All products, categories, variants, barcodes, and inventory entries created by that batch are deleted; Product catalog and inventory return to pre-import state; Batch remains visible in history with 'rolled_back' status

test_desc: Edge Case - Duplicate SKU rejected
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/product-catalog/product; Click Add Product; Fill SKU Code with 'KPI-001' (already exists); Fill all other required fields; Click Save
expected_result: Form submission fails; Error message indicates SKU 'KPI-001' is already in use; No duplicate product created; User remains on form to correct the SKU

test_desc: Edge Case - Cannot create GRN from draft or approved PO
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/grn/grn; Click Create GRN; Attempt to select a PO with status 'draft' or 'approved' from the PO dropdown
expected_result: PO dropdown only shows POs in 'sent' or 'partially_received' status; Draft and approved POs are not selectable; Error or empty state if no valid POs exist

test_desc: Edge Case - Cannot return more than receivable quantity
test_step: Navigate to supplier return create; Select a GRN; For a product with 10 accepted units and 5 already returned; Attempt to enter return quantity of 8 (exceeds remaining returnable=5)
expected_result: Form validation prevents quantity > returnable qty; Error message shows 'Return quantity cannot exceed returnable quantity of 5'; Save button remains disabled or shows error on submit

test_desc: Edge Case - Cannot dispatch more than picked quantity
test_step: Create a transfer; Move to picking status; Enter picked quantity of 30 for a product; Attempt to set dispatched quantity to 35
expected_result: System prevents dispatching more than picked quantity; Error shown: 'Dispatch quantity cannot exceed picked quantity'; Transfer remains in picking status

test_desc: Edge Case - Stock count finalize does not affect products with no variance
test_step: Create a stock count; Enter counted qty exactly equal to system qty for some products; Enter different qty for others; Finalize
expected_result: Only products with non-zero variance create adjustment records; Products with exact match are not adjusted; Movement ledger does not show entries for zero-variance products

test_desc: Edge Case - Approval audit log records all decisions
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/audit-log; Filter by module 'purchase_order'; View recent entries
expected_result: Audit log shows entries for every PO approval action: submission, approval, rejection; Each entry shows: action type, user who performed it, timestamp, before/after state; Log is read-only and cannot be edited or deleted

test_desc: Edge Case - Reports show zero/empty state when no data
test_step: In a fresh tenant with no transactions; Navigate to /console/modules/report/revenue; View all report pages
expected_result: Revenue report shows 0 values or empty chart gracefully (no JavaScript errors); Tables show empty state message or zero rows; No 500 errors or broken UI; KPI cards on dashboard show 0 for all metrics

test_desc: Edge Case - Inactive location excluded from PO and Transfer dropdowns
test_step: Create a location; Set its status to inactive; Navigate to Create PO and check location dropdown; Navigate to Create Transfer and check location dropdowns
expected_result: Inactive location does NOT appear in the Delivery Location dropdown on PO form; Inactive location does NOT appear in From or To Location dropdowns on Transfer form; Active locations remain selectable
